summary: Iteration 8 feature testing complete. All major new features verified: Block/Unblock wristband with red blocked alert, Guest profile tabs (history/consumptions/events/rewards), Exit page with open tab warning toast, TAP page with NFC scanner/barman selector/table toggle/custom items/revenue display. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test guests for block/unblock testing, test sessions for TAP testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 complete. All new features working: Block/Unblock wristband shows red alert with 'WRISTBAND BLOCKED' message. Guest Profile has 4 tabs (History, Consumptions, Events, Rewards). Exit page shows toast error when guest has open tab. TAP page fully functional with NFC scanner, barman selector (Carlos/Maria/João/Ana), table toggle, custom item form, revenue display (R$325). Login uses JSON body (not form data). 9 open tabs exist from testing.
